Velocity Registry

Home Broadband
Delivered Via Light.

Ditch congested traditional consumer ISPs. Traditional systems like Jio or Airtel depend on overlapping Radio Waves (Wi-Fi) that bottleneck behind barriers and leak metrics. LumenFi transmits ultra-fast internet over secure, unlicensed Light Waves (Li-Fi) directly into your workspace.

Physics Separation Protocol

Light waves are completely contained inside your walls and thousands of times wider than traditional radio channels. This structural setup is highly optimized for multi-gigabit streaming and local AI processing applications with zero micro-stutter.

Logistical Parameter Matrix

Deployment Windows: Home hardware kits step into configuration cycles within 3–5 structural business days.

Frequently Evaluated Physics

Unpacking The Signal Transmission Paradigm:

How does this scale beyond my standard Jio or Airtel Fiber setup?

Traditional fiber providers do an excellent job bringing high-speed data lines to your home boundary, but they bottleneck inside your rooms by handing that traffic over to standard radio wave Wi-Fi routers. LumenFi takes your fiber line and routes it straight through clean overhead visible light waves, preventing your speeds from suffering wireless degradation across walls.

Why is optical wireless internet highly optimized for next-generation AI platforms?

Light becomes Data
Connectivity is Better with LiFi
Wireless Communications that Pushes Connectivity to New Limits with Light.

IEEE 802.11bb Architecture Compliant
